messages.content: I'm sorry, as an AI language model, I do not possess the capability to create, nor cast spells. My programming is limited to answering questions and generating text based on given prompts. However, Hearthstone already has a lite version of their game available for mobile devices. Is there something more specific that you need assistance with?
I want create my card game like Hearthstone. Can you create cards for me?

I can definitely try to help you create some card ideas based on the mechanics and themes of Hearthstone. Here are a few examples:

1. Card Name: Fireball
Description: 2 Mana Spell that deals 6 damage to a single target.

2. Card Name: Ironhide
Description: 3 Mana Minion with 3 Attack and 5 Health. Taunt: All enemy minions attack this minion.

3. Card Name: Shadowstep
Description: 1 Mana Spell that returns a friendly minion to your hand and reduces its cost by 2 mana.

4. Card Name: Arcane Missiles
Description: 1 Mana Spell that deals 3 damage randomly split among enemy minions.

5. Card Name: Holy Light
Description: 2 Mana Spell that restores 6 Health to a single target, can be used on friendly characters.

These are just a few examples to get you started, but you can customize them as you see fit to fit the style and mechanics of your game. I hope this helps you get started on creating your own card game!
write code for Shadowstep and Arcane Missiles
create code for cards which summon another card
create code for card which deal 1 damage for all minions after cast spells
Rewrite it so it is not triggered after Play, but after spellCast
create code for cards "Deal 3 damage to target", "Deal 1 damage to ALL minions", "Draw a card" which are objects of the same class. Only "Deal 3 damage to target" has a target.
